scripts.dev:cf: set -a && . .dev.vars && set +a && npm run build && npm run db:migrate:local && npm run db:seed:local && wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.db:seed:local: wrangler d1 execute SimpleMealPlan-Production --local --file db/seed.sql && npm run db:demo:local
scripts.db:migrate:preview: CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=8b1e9fa39a0d7a3b5e2663e613c78e2d wrangler d1 migrations apply SimpleMealPlan-Preview --remote --env preview
scripts.db:demo:preview: CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=8b1e9fa39a0d7a3b5e2663e613c78e2d wrangler d1 execute SimpleMealPlan-Preview --remote --env preview --file db/demo-board-reset.sql
scripts.db:seed:preview: CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=8b1e9fa39a0d7a3b5e2663e613c78e2d wrangler d1 execute SimpleMealPlan-Preview --remote --env preview --file db/seed.sql
scripts.deploy:preview: set -a && . .dev.vars && set +a && npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name simple-meal-plan --branch preview
